error.message: string (human-readable, safe to surface in UI)

EarthquakeEvent.magnitude: number | null (Richter-scale magnitude; null if absent in feed)
EarthquakeEvent.place: string | null (human-readable place description from feed)
EarthquakeEvent.timeMs: integer (event time in milliseconds since unix epoch)

notes: section-1 owns all knowledge of the USGS feed URL and GeoJSON schema. section-2 receives only the normalized EarthquakeEvent[] array and never sees raw GeoJSON. Error path returns { ok: false, error } so section-2 / section-3 can render an error banner without try/catching across module boundaries. timeMs is integer epoch ms (not ISO string) so the consumer can format with new Date(timeMs).toLocaleString() at render time.
